name: HubSpot Marketing
description: HubSpot Marketing API lets you manage marketing events, record attendance, send transactional emails, and create forms for lead capture. Full CRUD operations on events, forms, and email templates.

capabilities.name: marketing_events_create
capabilities.description: Create a new marketing event with name, type, and dates.

capabilities.name: marketing_events_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all marketing events with pagination.

capabilities.name: marketing_events_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific marketing event.

capabilities.name: marketing_events_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a marketing event by its external ID.

capabilities.name: marketing_events_record_attendance
capabilities.description: Record contact attendance state for a marketing event.

capabilities.name: marketing_events_get_participation
capabilities.description: Retrieve participation breakdown for a marketing event.

capabilities.name: transactional_emails_send
capabilities.description: Send a transactional email using a pre-built template.

capabilities.name: forms_create
capabilities.description: Create a new form to capture leads.

capabilities.name: forms_list
capabilities.description: List all forms with pagination and filtering.

capabilities.name: forms_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific form.

capabilities.name: forms_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing form's fields and configuration.

capabilities.name: forms_delete
capabilities.description: Archive a form by its ID.

capabilities.name: forms_get_submissions
capabilities.description: Retrieve all submissions for a specific form.
